title: Setup — Papa+Eva already in the surf, Sara digging on sand off-frame
prompt: Composition is anchored by @ep12-c2-papa-eva. Animate the still gently — every figure stays in their EXACT physical spot throughout the entire 10s, only their faces and small upper-body gestures change. There are EXACTLY 2 people in the entire frame, no extras, no additional spawns. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) A small soft wave gently laps against Papa's shins with a soft swoosh. Eva softly giggles brightly above with her arms held up. Eva (cheerful sing-song laugh): "Daddy! The water's TICKLY!" Papa (warm dad-laugh, eyes crinkled): "Hold tight, little explorer!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Eva softly looks down to her left toward the dry sand beyond the surf, smiling. Papa rocks gently from side to side in the calm water, very slowly, swaying her playfully. Eva (delighted): "I'm SO TALL!" Papa (warm chuckle): "Tallest little waves-watcher on the beach." Papa stays grounded with both feet on the sandy seabed throughout — no swimming, no leaping, no falling. Eva stays safely seated on Papa's shoulders throughout. The surf stays plain blue gentle calm water — no big waves, no foam. Preserve each character's silhouette and proportions throughout — no morphing, no shifting, no color drift on Papa's shorts or t-shirt or Eva's teal swimsuit.
